Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ConnectedAppOauthIdToken

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ConnectedAppOauthIdToken
public class ConnectedAppOauthIdToken extends Object

Java class for ConnectedAppOauthIdToken complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConnectedAppOauthIdToken">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="idTokenAudience" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="idTokenIncludeAttributes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="idTokenIncludeCustomPerms" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="idTokenIncludeStandardClaims" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="idTokenValidity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
